content.full_text:
Assembly California Legislature

CHRIS CHANDLER
ASSEMBLYMAN, THIRD DISTRICT
REPRESENTING THE COUNTIES OF
BUTTE, COLUSA, NEVADA, SIERRA, SUTTER, & YUBA

September 25, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Use of Campaign Funds
(Chapter 5, Article 8, S85802)

Ladies and Gentlemen:

The purpose of this letter is to obtain advice regarding the allowable use of campaign funds under section 85802, article 8, section 5 of the Political Practices Act, as they apply to the following scenario.

The Member and his family are planning to travel by airplane to attend a fundraising event being hosted by another Legislator. They will then remain in the area for an extra two days, and return home.

Since the reason for travel is legislative/political in nature, what travel and accommodation expenses will be allowable under the Act?

Your assistance in this matter is greatly appreciated.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Susan F. Mejia
Treasurer
Friends of Chris Chandler

cc: file copy
